flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Daytona State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Daytona State College rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 (59.0% → 69.1%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Daytona State College fell 16% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.8k → $8.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Daytona State College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (9.2k → 10.2k).
